data.title: METiS BioTech's AI-enabled drug MTS-004 completes Phase III trial in China for PBA treatment, Oct. 23, 2025.
data.description: METiS TechBio, a prominent firm in AI-driven nanodelivery, is set to address the unmet demand for treating Pseudobulbar Affect (PBA) with its new drug, MTS-004. The announcement was made on October 23, 2025, in Beijing, China. Through innovative small-molecule solutions, this advancement showcases a breakthrough for those affected by PBA, a condition influencing over 1 million individuals globally.

data.title: Digital Brands Group's tech arm partners with Microsoft Azure Quantum for quantum computing initiatives.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on October 23, 2025, Digital Brands Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: DBGI) disclosed that its technology division is delving into cutting-edge quantum projects using Microsoft Azure Quantum. This platform is renowned for its cloud-based services in quantum computing and optimization.

data.title: Beyond Meat shares dropped 19% to $2.90 in pre-market trading. Short squeeze rally saw shares surge 127% on Monday and 146.26% on Tuesday. Company has $1.2 billion in debt against $360 million in revenue.
data.description: Correction on Beyond Meat's trading volume for Wednesday and pre-market movement on Thursday has been made. Beyond Meat Inc. (NASDAQ: BYND) saw a 19% drop to $2.90 in pre-market trading on Thursday. The stock experienced a Short Squeeze Rally, with shares rising 127% on Monday and 146.26% on Tuesday after being added to Roundhill Meme Stock ETF (NYSE: MEME). The rally was triggered by the ETF inclusion, a partnership with Walmart Inc. (NYSE: WMT), and debt restructuring. Beyond Meat holds around $1.2 billion in long-term debt compared to $360 million in trailing 12-month revenue. The California-based company's stock hit $7.69 mid-morning Wednesday before retracting. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Dow Inc. anticipates $1 billion in cost savings by 2026, with an adjusted loss of 19 cents/share in Q3 2025. Revenue down 8% to $9.97 billion. Quarter's GAAP net income $124 million.Operating EBIT $180 million, Cash flow $1.13 billion.
data.description: Dow Inc. (NYSE: DOW) stock is seeing a rise premarket following its report on the third-quarter 2025 financial results. The company exceeded expectations with an adjusted loss of 19 cents per share, surpassing the forecasted 29-cent loss. However, revenue dropped by 8% year over year to $9.97 billion, falling short of the estimated $10.23 billion. Dow reported a GAAP net income of $124 million for the quarter compared to $240 million in the same period last year. Operating EBIT decreased to $180 million from $641 million a year prior. Operating cash flow from continuing operations rose to $1.13 billion from $800 million in the previous year. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Crypto ISAC welcomes Phantom as its first charter member, boosting industry-wide security collaboration. Phantom has over 15 million users.
data.description: In Miami on October 23, 2025, the Crypto Information Sharing and Analysis Center (Crypto ISAC) revealed that Phantom, the top cryptowallet with a user base exceeding 15 million, has become its inaugural charter member. This development is a notable achievement for Crypto ISAC as it welcomes Phantom into its network.

data.title: NMF NYC Gala raises $800,000+ to address health workforce shortage with U.S. facing shortage of 700,000 medical professionals by 2035.
data.description: In a recent event in New York on October 23, 2025, the National Medical Fellowships (NMF) successfully gathered over $800,000 in funds. This money is aimed at providing support to medical students and health professionals. The initiative comes at a crucial time, as the United States is projected to encounter a deficit of almost 700,000 physicians, registered nurses (RNs), and licensed practical nurses (LPNs) in the coming decade according to the Health Resources and Services Administration (HRSA).

data.title: Vertiv Holdings Co (VRT) surpassed Q3 expectations with 29% Y/Y sales growth to $2.68B. Raised fiscal 2025 adjusted EPS to $4.07–$4.13 and sales outlook to $10.16B–$10.24B. For Q4, adjusted EPS of $1.23–$1.29 expected.
data.description: Vertiv Holdings Co (NYSE: VRT) exceeded expectations in their third-quarter fiscal 2025 report. They reported a 29% increase in net sales Y/Y, reaching $2.68 billion, surpassing the estimated $2.56 billion. Their adjusted EPS was $1.24, also beating estimates of $0.99. The company raised its fiscal 2025 adjusted EPS guidance to $4.07–$4.13, up from $3.75–$3.85, surpassing the consensus of $3.81. Furthermore, they increased their 2025 sales forecast to $10.16 billion–$10.24 billion, higher than the previous range of $9.93 billion–$10.08 billion and the estimated $10.04 billion. For the fourth quarter, Vertiv anticipates an adjusted EPS of $1.23–$1.29.

data.title: Zoomd and E2 have signed a partnership to boost Zoomd's presence in sports betting. (Total words: 16)
data.description: In Toronto on October 23, 2025, Zoomd Technologies Ltd. (TSXV: ZOMD) (OTC: ZMDTF) and its subsidiary Zoomd Ltd. revealed that they have entered into a new venture. Zoomd, a prominent marketing technology company, specializes in user acquisition and engagement through their MarTech platform.

data.title: Antelope Surgical Solutions to present at 2025 Mid-Atlantic Capital Conference, showcasing fluorescence-guided oncology platform.
data.description: Antelope Surgical Solutions, an innovative theranostics biotechnology company, showcased its fluorescence-guided oncology platform in New York on Oct. 23, 2025. The platform is the first of its kind in the world, utilizing a fluorescent radioligand to aid in cancer detection and treatment. The company's presentation comes as investor and strategic interest in the technology continues to rise. This clinical-stage company is gaining attention for its cutting-edge approach to oncology, with potential applications in various medical fields.

data.title: Saudi Arabia pet food market valued at $74.56 million in 2024, expected to reach $82.56 million by 2030 with 1.71% CAGR due to rising pet ownership.
data.description: The report "Saudi Arabia Pet Food Market, By Region, Competition, Forecast & Opportunities, 2020-2030F" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The Saudi Arabia Pet Food Market reached a value of USD 74.56 Million in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 82.56 Million by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 1.71%. The market in Saudi Arabia is seeing consistent expansion, fueled by various factors such as a rise in pet ownership, notably among younger age groups.

data.title: Valero's Q3 2025 earnings report beats estimates, with revenue at $32.2B, adjusted earnings of $3.66/share. Refining segment key to $1.6B operating income.
data.description: Valero Energy Corp.'s stock (NYSE: VLO) experienced a surge following the release of their third-quarter fiscal 2025 earnings report, surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported quarterly revenue of $32.2 billion, exceeding the anticipated $29.9 billion. Furthermore, adjusted earnings per share stood at $3.66, surpassing the estimated $3.05 per share by Wall Street. Valero closed the quarter with $4.8 billion in cash and cash equivalents and carried total debt amounting to $8.4 billion. In terms of segment performance, the Refining sector emerged as the primary contributor to operating income, generating $1.6 billion.

data.title: Tesla stock is down post third-quarter results. Revenue at $28.10B, missing EPS target at 50 cents per share. 497,099 vehicles delivered.
data.description: Tesla Inc (TSLA) shares are trading down following the release of its third-quarter results. The company reported revenue of $28.10 billion, surpassing analyst expectations of $26.24 billion. However, adjusted earnings of 50 cents per share fell short of the estimated 54 cents per share. Total revenue saw a 12% year-over-year increase, with automotive revenue up 6% to $21.2 billion. Tesla manufactured 447,450 vehicles in Q3 and delivered 497,099. The company is experiencing pressure from bearish momentum post-earnings release. Read more on the complete story and analysis.

data.title: Brooklyn Chop House to open in Miami on Nov 11, 2025, combining steakhouse dining and Asian cuisine in Wynwood.
data.description: Reservations are now open for the grand opening of Brooklyn Chop House in Miami's Wynwood neighborhood on November 11th, 2025. Known for its unique blend of traditional steakhouse fare and innovative Asian dishes, the renowned New York restaurant is set to open its new location on the seventh floor. Make sure to secure your spot for this highly anticipated dining experience.
